title: Evangelion Redefines Physics
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Redefines Physics             Quote Post by Somnius Kenate » Tue Jul 06, 2004 3:39 am In the "End of Evangelion" how do Shinji and Asuka get from their respective Evangelion units to the beach in Tokyo-3?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Tue Jul 06, 2004 4:50 am They turned into lcl and then came back.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 06, 2004 10:21 am They were on a shore, their LCL washed up on the shore and formed their bodies or their bodies formed in the LCL ocean and were washed up. Either works in my opinion but the idea is they were washed up on shore from the LCL ocean.

[]:             Quote Post by Somnius Kenate » Tue Jul 06, 2004 7:51 pm Hate to sound nitpicky, but if that is the case, how do they have clothes on?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:30 pm ............................................................. ONLY THE MYSTICAL FLAMMING GOD HAMSTER KNOWS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I don't know, it would have made the scene very hard to pull of if they were naked. Think about what the audience would think when Shinji sat on her to choke her......

[]:             Quote Post by Somnius Kenate » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:32 pm The God Hamster! Go for the eyes, Boo, the eyes! Yeah, I guess we can go for the "It's just an anime" theory. Or maybe Monty Python style where the animator draws clothes for them.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:38 pm Well one thing is that they wouldn't want fan boys getting "excited" in the movie theater after seeing Asuka TWICE naked.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:43 pm Depends if you like her or not, I have a couple of Rei-lover fans who would gag at that but I would enjoy it

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:50 pm Tru..........very tru..............so would I............... 8)

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:55 pm ARe you saying that you would gag or would enjoy asukas lack of clothing?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:57 pm I would enjoy it, not as much as others...... 8)

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:58 pm That good, making sure your on the right side of the fence there

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Tue Jul 06, 2004 9:04 pm Yes, there's always the "just a cartoon" theory. Though I personally reasoned to it being that it was the way they had imagined themselves when they returned from the sea of LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:48 am i think its because Shinji thinks or imagines or whatevers himself like that..just like how he creates the plug suit where there is nothing (after beating zeruel) there is also the fact that in EoE he is practically god...

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:15 am sadsadshinji wrote: just like how he creates the plug suit where there is nothing ..

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:38 pm That's not a mistake coff! Listen to what Ritsuko is saying! :( Nobody pays attention to the blonde scientists...

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:46 pm Yea they had to make something up when the realized they made a mistake.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:47 pm I get the feeling I'm missing something... Was what she said only in the dub version?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:57 pm Well I assume your talking about the time when Shinji got absorbed into the Eva with his street clothes on, but then a plugsuit came out instead of his clothes.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:18 pm Yeah I was, and Ritsuko said that Shinji's ego border (or something like that) was giving physical form to his plugsuit...
